name: _instance_hash
description: unique hash for a discrete instance of flight waypoint

name: latitude
description: WSG84 latitude for the for the waypoint

name: longitude
description: WSG84 latitude for the for the waypoint

name: altitude_baro
description: altitude in feet MSL for the waypoint

name: flight_level
description: flight level in hectofeet for the waypoint, snapped to our standard list of FLs

name: imputed
description: `true` if the waypoint was backward interpolated over a window w/o observations

name: icao_address
description: icao address of the aircraft associated with the waypoint

name: flight_id
description: Spire-provided UUID of the aircraft associated with the waypoint

name: callsign
description: call sign of the aircraft associated with the waypoint

name: tail_number
description: tail number of the aircraft associated with the waypoint

name: flight_number
description: flight_number of the aircraft associated with the waypoint

name: aircraft_type_icao
description: icao code for aircraft type associated with the waypoint

name: airline_iata
description: airline iata code for the aircraft associated with the waypoint

name: departure_airport_icao
description: departure icao code for the airport associated with the flight instance

name: departure_scheduled_time
description: departure (takeoff) scheduled time for the flight instance

name: arrival_airport_icao
description: arrival icao code for the airport associated with the flight instance

name: arrival_scheduled_time
description: arrival (landing) scheduled time for the flight instance
